design_philosophy: The platform is an operational tool, not just a brochure. It emphasizes real-time functional features (instant quote calculator, tracking) and immediate value over generic marketing. High contrast, rigid grids, and objective clarity ensure users can accomplish their tasks quickly.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-black text-slate-900
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold text-slate-900
scales.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-bold text-slate-500

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing for marketing sections (p-12, p-16, p-24), dense and compact spacing for the calculator and admin dashboard (p-4, p-6).
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: MODE A: THE 'TETRIS' GRID (Asymmetry, Visual Tension). Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with gap-8 to gap-12. Mix spans (e.g., col-span-8, col-span-4) for service highlights.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID. Strict grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel must be utilized with h-full.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Maximum width mx-auto max-w-7xl for standard pages. Full width with internal padding for hero sections.

components.strategy: Hybrid Approach. Pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing layouts (hero, bento grids, features) to allow overlapping and asymmetry. Heavily customized Shadcn UI components for the interactive logic (calculator form, tracking inputs, admin dashboard).

surfaces.header: Crystal Glass. backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 with a delicate 1px border-b border-slate-200. Ensures nav links remain readable while allowing the page underneath to peek through.
surfaces.cards_marketing: Flat background (bg-white or bg-slate-50), crisp 1px border (border-slate-200), zero shadow by default. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow (shadow-lg) to signal interactivity.
surfaces.cards_dashboard: Grid Borders ('Technical' Look). border-collapse style layout, border-r border-b border-slate-200 to expose the skeleton. Zero rounded corners for a rigid, functional feel (or max rounded-sm).

components.buttons: Sharp corners or minimal rounding (rounded-md). High contrast. Primary buttons use brand Trust Blue (#1E3A8A) with white text. Secondary/Action buttons (like 'Calculate Quote') use Safety Yellow (#FBBF24) with dark text (#0F172A). Must have explicit focus and hover states.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Labels must be uppercase and tracked out (text-xs tracking-[0.2em]). Inputs should have crisp borders (border-slate-300 focus:border-blue-800 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-800).
components.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a professional, slightly technical look.

motion_and_interactions.general: Minimalist and purposeful. Micro-interactions for feedback.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and links must explicitly set hover colors (e.g., hover:bg-blue-800 hover:text-white). Cards lift slightly on hover.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties (transition-transform duration-200 ease-out). No transition-all.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use indeterminate progress bars or spinning Phosphor icons for the quote calculator and tracking searches.

hero_background.description: A blue semi-truck driving on a rural highway under clear skies. Use as the main hero background with a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-900/80 via-slate-900/50 to-transparent) to ensure the white/yellow heading text pops.

service_b2b.description: Industrial loading bays with vibrant yellow walls. Use in the Bento Grid for the 'Weekly loads for professionals (B2B)' service block.

service_b2c.description: Man standing beside a white delivery van. Use in the Bento Grid for the 'Particular loads/unloads & door-to-door (B2C)' service block.

fleet_showcase.description: Truck on a highway with traffic lights. Use in the Fleet & Services section or About section.

landing: Navigation Bar (Logo, Services, Calculator, Tracking, FAQ, Contact)
Hero Section (Value proposition 'Girona-Barcelona', Trust indicators, CTA to Calculator)
Service Models (Bento Grid: B2B Weekly Cargas vs B2C Particulares)
Interactive Quote Calculator (Origin, Destination, Weight/Vol, Service Type, Time + Surcharge post-18h)
Fleet & Reliability (Images of vehicles, Trust signals)
FAQ Section (Clear answers on pricing, out-of-hours, door-to-door)
admin_dashboard: Overview Stats (Total Quotes, B2B vs B2C split)
Data Table (Recent quote requests with details: Origin, Dest, Price, Type, Status)

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: Cabinet Grotesk (headings) and IBM Plex Sans (body). Ensure they are loaded globally.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='quote-calculator-submit').

Build the Quote Calculator as a highly interactive, dense, single-view form (Control Room style). Do not split it into multiple pages. Ensure the post-18h surcharge logic is clearly visible when selected.
Do NOT use generic 'Card' components from Shadcn for the marketing sections. Build custom HTML/Tailwind grids (Bento style) to allow for image overlapping and distinct visual tension.
Ensure the hero image has a proper dark gradient overlay on the left side so the text achieves at least a 4.5:1 contrast ratio.
Implement the Floating WhatsApp/Telegram button in the bottom right corner with a subtle pulse animation.
Keep the entire UI strictly in Spanish as requested.
